programs.title: Codes and Conspiracies 2
programs.desc: The second series of the program.In this installment, producers will reveal the secrets of legendary places, the most important inventions and influential figures.Viewers will learn facts that have not appeared in books and historical studies before.This season of the series will be devoted to the secrets of Las Vegas;the history of American Nazis;stories about ancient astronauts.In subsequent episodes, viewers will take on the role of detectives who discover the mysteries of world history themselves.They will also look behind the scenes of secret societies.They will analyze the biographies of famous people and the subsequent stages of creating innovative inventions.They will visit legendary, popular places from around the world and learn about iconic objects.

programs.title: Blowing Up History 4
programs.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programs.title: How It's Made: Dream Cars 3
programs.desc: The hosts of the series take viewers on a trip to the fascinating world of the automotive industry.They will show how the cars that many drivers dream of were created.They will visit the birthplaces of unique cars.
